lambdaURLInUsed.^description: Function URLs: {$COUNT} of your Lambda URL are enabled. Please make sure it's used with caution and proper security configuration.

lambdaMissingRole.^description: Execution Role: Role of {$COUNT} of your Lambda is not exist. Please assign a valid role to your Lambda functions.

lambdaURLWithoutAuth.^description: Function URLs AuthType: {$COUNT} of your Lambda function URLs does not configured for authentication type. Please ensure proper authentication has been configured
ref: [Security and Auth Model for Lambda function URLs]<https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/urls-auth.html>

lambdaCodeSigningDisabled.^description: Code Signing: Code Signing has not been enabled for {$COUNT} of your Lambda. Enable Code Signing to ensure only trusted code run in your Lambda functions

lambdaDeadLetterQueueDisabled.^description: Dead Letter Queue: Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) has not been enabled for {$COUNT} of your Lambda. Enable DLQ to send unprocessed events to SQS or SNS topic.

lambdaCMKEncryptionDisabled.^description: Customer Managed Key: CMK is not enabled for {$COUNT} of your Lambda funciton. Enable CMK to enjoy a more granular control over the data encryption and decryption process.
lambdaCMKEncryptionDisabled.shortDesc: Customer Managed Key Not In Used

lambdaEnhancedMonitoringDisabled.^description: Enhanced Monitoring: Enhanced Monitoring is disabled for {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions. Enabled enhanced monitoring to better monitor, troubleshoot and optimize functions.

lambdaReservedConcurrencyDisabled.^description: Provisioned Concurrency: Provisioned Concurrency is disabled for {$COUNT} of your Lambda function. Enable provision concurrency to improve Lambda scaling performance.

lambdaTracingDisabled.^description: Tracing: Tracing feature is diabled for {$COUNT} of your Lambda function. Enable tracing for better visibility of execution and performance of functions.

lambdaRoleReused.^description: Execution Role Reused: {$COUNT} of your Lambda function is having the same execution role. Please create isolated execution role to provide least privilege permission to the Lambda function.

lambdaRuntimeUpdate.^description: Runtime Update Available: New runtime version available for {$COUNT} of your Lambda. Please update your Lambda runtime to enjoy the latest features and patches.

lambdaNotInUsed7Days.^description: Function not in used: {$COUNT} of your Lambda is not invoked in past 7 days. Remove unused function to maintain up-to-date environment and control costs
lambdaNotInUsed7Days.shortDesc: Function not in used for 7 days

lambdaNotInUsed30Days.^description: Function not in used: {$COUNT} of your Lambda is not invoked in past 30 days. Remove unused function to maintain up-to-date environment and control costs
lambdaNotInUsed30Days.shortDesc: Function not in used for 30 days

lambdaPublicAccess.^description: Function with public access: {$COUNT} of your Lambda is allowed public access in resource-based policy. Please restrict access to authorized principals only

UseArmArchitecture.^description: {$COUNT} of your Lambda function(s) are not using arm64 architecture. Lambda functions that use arm64 architecture (AWS Graviton2 processor) can achieve significantly better price and performance than the equivalent function running on x86_64 architecture. Consider using arm64 for compute-intensive applications such as high-performance computing, video encoding, and simulation workloads.

lambdaSQSVisibilityTimeout.^description: SQS Visibility Timeout: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions with SQS triggers have visibility timeout less than 6x function timeout. This may cause duplicate message processing.

lambdaAsyncRetryNotConfigured.^description: Async Retry Configuration: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions do not have customized async invocation retry configuration. Configure retry attempts and event age for better reliability.

lambdaNoCloudWatchAlarms.^description: CloudWatch Alarms: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions do not have CloudWatch alarms configured for critical metrics (Errors, Duration, Throttles). Configure alarms for proactive monitoring.

lambdaPartialBatchResponseDisabled.^description: Partial Batch Response: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions with stream event sources do not have partial batch response enabled. Enable ReportBatchItemFailures to avoid reprocessing entire batches.

lambdaBatchingWindowNotConfigured.^description: Batching Window: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions with stream event sources do not have batching window configured. Configure batching window to aggregate records for better efficiency.

lambdaNoIteratorAgeAlarm.^description: IteratorAge Monitoring: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions consuming streams do not have IteratorAge alarms configured. Monitor IteratorAge to detect processing lag.

lambdaGuardDutyProtectionDisabled.^description: GuardDuty Lambda Protection: GuardDuty Lambda Protection is not enabled in this account. Enable Lambda Protection for threat detection on your Lambda functions.

lambdaNoEnvironmentVariables.^description: Environment Variables: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions do not have environment variables defined. Consider using environment variables for configuration instead of hard-coding values.

lambdaMemoryNotOptimized.^description: Memory Optimization: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions may have sub-optimal memory configuration. Review memory usage and adjust for cost and performance optimization.

lambdaTimeoutNotOptimized.^description: Timeout Configuration: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions have timeout configuration that may not match execution patterns. Review and optimize timeout settings.

lambdaRoleTooPermissive.^description: IAM Permissions: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions have execution roles with overly broad permissions. Review and apply least privilege principle.

lambdaQuotasNotMonitored.^description: Service Quotas: Lambda service quotas are approaching limits in this account. Monitor quotas and request increases if needed to prevent service disruptions.

lambdaNoReservedConcurrencyForThrottling.^description: Reserved Concurrency: {$COUNT} of your Lambda functions experience throttling but do not have reserved concurrency configured. Consider setting reserved concurrency to protect downstream services.
